command: import json, os; from pathlib import Path; Path(os.environ['LOOM_TRAJECTORY_PATH']).write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version': 1, 'events': [{'kind': 'message', 'content': 'example execution'}, {'kind': 'tool_call', 'name': 'lookup'}]}) + '\n', encoding='utf-8'); Path('execution-summary.json').write_text('complete\n', encoding='utf-8')

import json, os, zipfile; from pathlib import Path; archive=zipfile.ZipFile(os.environ['LOOM_EXECUTION_RESULT_ZIP']); assert 'worker-result.json' in archive.namelist(); result={'schema_version': 1, 'outcome': 'pass', 'oracle_version': 'completion-check-v1', 'reward': {'value': 1.0, 'components': {'completed': 1.0}, 'metadata': {'scale': 'unit'}}, 'summary': {'reason': 'execution package is present'}}; Path(os.environ['LOOM_ORACLE_RESULT_PATH']).write_text(json.dumps(result) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
